title: Subtext Issue
description: One published-ready Subtext read: the consensus surface line, the subtext beneath it, the product/strategy take, a gated AI take, a takeaway, and self-scores. Appended one-per-line to data/subtext/issues.jsonl.

issue_date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the weekly issue

surface_line.description: The consensus read — the obvious take everyone repeats. Rendered struck-through.

subtext.description: The read underneath — why they're actually doing this and what it means.

ai_take.description: Gated AI lens: 2-3 concrete sentences, or null if the AI lens was skipped.

ai_lens_skipped_reason.description: One-line reason if ai_take is null; otherwise null.

differentiation.description: 1-10. 9-10 = only you could write it; <5 = kill.

could_anyone_else_write_this.description: One-line check. 'no, because ...' is the passing answer.

forced_ai_check.description: Did the take need the AI lens, or was it decoration?

format.description: Render format. Lens logic is identical across formats.

status.description: Nothing reaches 'published' without the user's explicit approve.

weakest_flag.description: True if this was flagged the weakest issue of its batch.
